subject: RE: 17–19 First Avenue, Surfers Paradise (Property) : AMFS 2 Pty Ltd, Aryton Mansi, Widegate Pty Limited, Freddie Sheene
snippet: Hi Aryton As instructed, we have sent the attached email to Holding Redlich chasing copies of the documents. We will let you know when we receive a reply. Yours faithfully Jon‑Paul Selfe Special
